text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Men 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Homeless Families Homeless Men Homeless Women Homeless Youth Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF UNION GOSPEL MISSION OF SALEM MEN'S MISSION SHOWER FACILITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers shower facilities. 777 Commercial Street NE Salem, OR 973010431 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and minors accompanied by a parent or guardian who are experiencing homelessness. Service animals accepted. Hours: 7 days per week 9am-4:30pm Email (503) 362-3983 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNION GOSPEL MISSION OF SALEM SHOWER FACILITIES
